scripts.build: tsc -p packages/engine/tsconfig.json && node packages/vscode-ext/esbuild.js && node packages/desktop/esbuild.js
scripts.build:prod: tsc -p packages/engine/tsconfig.json && node packages/vscode-ext/esbuild.js --production && node packages/desktop/esbuild.js --production
scripts.typecheck: tsc --build packages/engine && tsc -p packages/vscode-ext/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/desktop/tsconfig.json --noEmit
